Class CookableToppings

java.lang.Object
RestaurantGame.Toppings
RestaurantGame.CookableToppings
Direct Known Subclasses:
Patty
public abstract class CookableToppings extends Toppings
An abstract class for toppings that can be cooked. Cookable toppings track how long they have been cooking using an timer.

  • Constructor Details

    • CookableToppings

      public CookableToppings(double price, double prepTime, String toppingName)
      creates a cookable topping with a price, prep time, and name.
      Parameters:
      price - : The cost of this topping
      prepTime - : how long it needs to cook
      toppingName - : The name of the topping

  • Method Details

    • getPrepTime

      public double getPrepTime()
      Returns the recommended preparation (cooking) time for this topping.
      Returns:
      the ideal cooking time in seconds

    • startCooking

      public void startCooking()
      Starts the cooking timer for this topping.

    • getCookingTime

      public double getCookingTime()
      Returns how long this topping has been cooking so far.
      Returns:
      the number of seconds elapsed on the timer

    • stopCooking

      public void stopCooking()
      Stops the cooking timer.
